summary: TP FlashAttention implementation correctly handles KV cache sharding for GQA models with row-parallel O projection.

notes: KV cache sharding correct: each GPU stores 1/tp_size of KV heads
For Qwen3.5 GQA (32 Q heads, 4 KV heads, TP=4): each GPU gets 8 Q heads, 1 KV head
FlashAttention is completely local - no cross-GPU communication needed for attention
Row-parallel O projection with allreduce correctly aggregates outputs
Comprehensive docstring explaining TP strategy and GQA implications
Good separation of column-parallel QKV and row-parallel O projection logic
Tests verify local_num_kv_heads and local_num_attention_heads are correctly computed
All TP methods (_prefill_full_attention_tp, _prefill_linear_attention_tp, _prefill_ffn_tp) verified to exist

sharedStateObservations.description: GQA with TP=4 means attention is completely local - each GPU has its own KV head, no cross-GPU attention needed
FlashAttention kernel takes local_num_attention_heads and local_num_kv_heads as parameters
QK-norm + RoPE applied per-token after column-parallel QKV projection, before FlashAttention
